case_title: BLU JASON VASS BRAYAN VS. DISCOVER BANK

docket_entries.description: DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY DEPONENT DISCOVER BANK
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL FILED BY PLAINTIFF VASS BRAYAN, BLU JASON AS TO DEFENDANT DISCOVER BANK

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF JAN-30-2017 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF JAN-30-2017 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. PLAINTIFF BLU JASON VASS BRYAN IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT DISCOVER BANK IS PRESENT. REPRESENTED BY IVY SPENCE, VENDOR ANALYST AND CUSTODIAN OF RECORDS. DEFENDANT WAIVES SERVICE. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL; CLERK: J. MURPHY; NOT REPORTED. (506)
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JAN-30-2017 - JUDGMENT.

PARTIES WAIVE SERVICE ON PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM. THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF VASS BRAYAN, BLU JASON IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT DISCOVER BANK THE FAIR CREDIT REPORTING ACT, 155 USC 1681 ET. SEC, RELATING TO CREDIT REPORTING AGENCY PRACTICES OR THE CONSUMER CREDIT REPORTING AGENCIES ACT, CC 1785.1-1785.36 DO NOT ENCOMPASS PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM NOR IS PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM ENCOMPASSED BY THE ROSENTHAL FAIR DEBT COLLECTION PRACTICES ACT CC 1788-1788.33 OR THE FEDERAL CONSUMBER CREDIT PRACTICES ACT USC 1692-1692P. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $5,000.00 FILED BY VASS BRAYAN, BLU JASON AS TO DEFENDANT DISCOVER BANK ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JAN-30-2017 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506

REQUEST TO WAIVE COURT FEES AND COSTS PURSUANT TO G.C. 68633, CRC 3.51, 8.26, AND 8.818 (CONFIDENTIAL) FILED BY PLAINTIFF VASS BRAYAN, BLU JASON ORDER FOR WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS GRANTED PURSUANT TO G.C. 68634 (E), CRC 3.52
